title: Crisis Management
shortSummary: Survive and recover from political crises — scandals, gaffes, policy failures, and external shocks. Learn the frameworks that determine whether a crisis ends a career or becomes a turning point.
whyItMatters: Every political career will face a crisis. The difference between those who survive and those who don't is almost always preparation, speed, and discipline. Crisis management is not optional — it is survival.
coreConcepts: The anatomy of a political crisis
